nodes.name: Prepare IG Post
nodes._note: Instagram Reels posting requires hosting the video at a public URL. Future: upload to PocketBase or S3, then use the URL for IG Reels API. For now this node prepares the caption and metadata.

env_vars_required.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Anthropic API key for Claude Haiku
env_vars_required.META_ACCESS_TOKEN: Long-lived Meta/Instagram access token (for future Reels posting)
env_vars_required.IG_USER_ID: Instagram Business Account ID (for future Reels posting)
